MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Consent Judgment is GRANTED. A statement of non-opposition was filed. ORDER and JUDGEMENT SIGNED in open court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
